items.title: Weekly activity groups
items.body: Two active dance groups, with a third aerobics group and a Mahjong group coming soon, offering members more opportunities to stay active, have fun, and build lasting friendships.

items.title: Educational workshops
items.body: Regular talks and hands-on sessions on staying healthy, active, and connected later in life.

items.title: Gardening
items.body: Growing things together outdoors — good for the body, the mind, and making friends.

items.title: Digital skills
items.body: Friendly, patient help with phones, computers, and the internet — at your own pace.

items.title: Elder-abuse awareness
items.body: Workshops that help seniors recognize, prevent, and report abuse and fraud.

items.title: Financial information for seniors
items.body: Plain-language guidance on pensions, benefits, and managing money safely.
